title: Create Survival
description: This is a modpack with the addition of "Create".
body:
# Create Survival ## 🌟 Integrated package features **Industrial Revolution × Tactical Armament × Immersive Experience** Build an industrial system with mechanical power as the core, integrate the precision shooting art of the Eternal Gun Workshop, and create an immersive experience that combines hard-core production and tactical confrontation through the linkage of 72 functional modules. You can play solo or join a server that uses this modpack!! --- ### 🛠️ Core Module Architecture #### 🎩 Create - **Create** The main gameplay of this integrated pack! --- ### 🎮 Immersion Enhancement Kit #### 🖥️ Performance Optimization Matrix | Mods | Features | |---------------------|----------------------------------| | Sodium+Indium | Fast loading game | | Modern UI | Better UI | #### 🎨 Visual Enhancement System - **Visual**: Continuity + Light and Shadow Pack - **Dynamic Lights**: LambDynamicLights - **Other**: Chalk colored chalk #### 🧰 Survival Optimization Scheme - **Material Management** 'Quick Shulker' quick shulker box operation 'Sophisticated Backpacks' backpacks - **Survival Enhancement** 'Better Climbing' realistic climbing physics 'ItemPhysic' item physics falls 'Break Free' free destruction mechanism --- ### 🔍 HUD Enhancement Matrix | Mods | Feature Highlights | |---------------------|----------------------------------| | Jade | Block Information Query | | KronHUD | Customizable Information Panel | | BetterF3 | Beautiful debugging interface | | Health Overlay | Better Health Bar | --- ### 🧩 Compatibility Notes - **Input Method Fix**: Better input within the game - **Skin System**: Universal skin patch + Minecraft Capes - **Control Optimization**: Tweakeroo advanced features --- **⚠Warning⚠**
Note: Firearms are included and are not recommended for younger children
Mods -JEI物品管理器 (Just Enough Items)
